title: ditassa dolichoglossa
intro: Ditassa dolichoglossa, also known as the 'long-lipped Ditassa', is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Ditassa dolichoglossa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antivenom. Ditassa dolichoglossa is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, often by boiling its roots or leaves in water to extract its medicinal compounds.
